title: Summer Break in Cala Ratjada, Mallorca

slots.name: Flight to Palma de Mallorca
slots.description: Direct flight from Berlin (BER) to Palma de Mallorca (PMI). Estimated cost for 2 adults based on peak July pricing.

slots.name: Car Rental Pickup & Drive to Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Pick up rental car at the airport. Estimated cost for 4 days in July. Drive to Cala Ratjada (approx. 1 hour).

slots.name: Late Lunch at Noah's Lounge
slots.description: Relaxed lunch by the sea at Noah's Lounge. High-quality international cuisine and great atmosphere.

slots.name: Beach Relaxation & Harbor Stroll
slots.description: Spend the afternoon lounging at Playa Son Moll or exploring the Cala Ratjada harbor.

slots.name: Hotel Check-in
slots.description: Check-in at a highly-rated boutique hotel. Lago Garden offers a luxury spa experience near the harbor.
slots.location: Lago Garden Apart-Suites & Spa Hotel, Cala Ratjada

slots.name: Dinner at Rö Sushi Nikkei
slots.description: High-quality fusion dining with harbor views. Blending Japanese and Peruvian flavors.

slots.name: Hidden Beach: Hike to Cala Torta
slots.description: Drive to Cala Mesquida and hike the coastal trail to the secluded Cala Torta. A 'virgin' beach in a natural reserve. Bring water and snacks.

slots.name: Dinner at Restaurant Los Arcos
slots.description: Iconic Mediterranean gastronomy. Famous for fresh fish and paella. Highest rated local spot.

slots.name: Traditional Lunch at Sa Trobada
slots.description: Authentic Mallorcan lunch in the historic center of Capdepera. Traditional dishes away from the tourist crowds.

slots.name: Capdepera Castle Visit
slots.description: Visit the medieval castle of Capdepera for panoramic views of the coastline.

slots.name: Light Hike: Deià Coastal Loop
slots.description: A light 5km circular hike from the village of Deià down to the scenic shingle beach of Cala Deià. Classic stone paths and olive groves.

slots.name: Drive to Tramuntana Mountains
slots.description: Scenic drive across the island to the Tramuntana mountains (approx. 1.5 hours).

slots.name: Explore Valldemossa
slots.description: Explore the charming streets of Valldemossa or visit the Cartuja. Allow ample time for the return drive to Cala Ratjada.

slots.name: Return Drive to Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Drive back to Cala Ratjada. Estimated 1.5 - 2 hours with afternoon traffic. Arrive by 19:30 to freshen up for dinner.

slots.name: Farewell Dinner at CUCUM Beach House
slots.description: Sophisticated beachfront dining at the newly rebranded CUCUM Beach House. Perfect for a final night celebration.
slots.location: CUCUM Beach House, Playa Son Moll

slots.name: Morning Swim at Cala Agulla
slots.description: Final morning swim at Cala Agulla, a beautiful beach surrounded by pine trees, just a short drive or walk from the hotel.

slots.name: Drive to Airport & Car Return
slots.description: Drive back to Palma Airport and return the rental car. Allow time for traffic.

slots.name: Flight to Berlin Airport (BER)
slots.description: Direct flight from Palma de Mallorca (PMI) to Berlin (BER). Cost included in Day 1 round-trip estimate.
